title: madhuca caloneura
intro: Madhuca caloneura is a plant species belonging to the Sapotaceae family, commonly found in the tropical forests of India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Madhuca caloneura include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Madhuca caloneura can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
